pr.title: gmcamera work + minor scene handler update
pr.author: sadkellz

summary: Advanced decompilation of gmCamera by replacing placeholders with typed includes, prototypes, structs, and matched implementations for camera-mode frame/enter logic, while also correcting the game-mode scene data table to use minor-scene enum IDs instead of major-scene IDs. The scene-handler correction was explicitly validated in review as explaining previously nonsensical callbacks.
what_changed: Added a forward declaration for CameraVsData in src/melee/gm/forward.h.
Removed an unused include of it/forward.h from src/melee/gm/gm_1601.h.

Expanded gmCamera includes to use real headers such as gm/gmcamera.static.h, baselib/sislib.h, gm/gm_1A36.h, gm/gm_1A45.h, gm/types.h, lb/lbaudio_ax.h, lb/lbsnap.h, and mn/mn_2295.h instead of relying on local extern declarations.
Commented out old local HSD_SisLib extern declarations in gmcamera.c after including the proper sislib header.
Changed HSD_SisLib_804D1124 usage in gmCamera_801A2224 to cast the global to SisLibUnkStruct before dereferencing x0C_ptr->x08_arr.
Retyped gmCamera_801A2334 from a vague void* function with three parameters into HSD_Text* gmCamera_801A2334(s32, f32, f32, f32, f32), using HSD_Text fields x24.x, x24.y, and x49 directly.
Cleaned up gmCamera_801A2334 by removing large TODO/commented matching notes and replacing them with typed local variables and direct struct-field writes.
Adjusted gmCamera_801A2334 pointer arithmetic for gmCamera_80479BC8.gcus2_ptrs using arg0 * 0x10 and a cast to gmCameraUnkStruct2*.
Added a dont_inline pragma around gmCamera_801A2650, preserving matching behavior while keeping the function in C.

Implemented gmCamera_801A34FC_OnFrame, including snap checks, SIS text cleanup, call to gmCamera_801A33BC, menu transition handling via mn_8022F218/mn_8022F268, button handling via gm_801A36A0, audio feedback via lbAudioAx_80024030, and state changes through gmCamera_80479C20.x0.
Implemented gmCamera_801A3634_OnEnter, storing the incoming state pointer, initializing camera SIS data with gmCamera_801A2650, clearing three text slots, and calling gmCamera_801A33BC.
Added new src/melee/gm/gmcamera.static.h declaring static CameraVsData gmCamera_80479C20 and static f32 gmCamera_803DA758[12].
Expanded gmCameraUnkStruct in gmcamera.h with named or partially typed fields including ifvscam, x28, x2C, x30, x38, x40, x44, x48, and x54.
Updated gmCamera function prototypes in gmcamera.h, including gmCamera_801A2334 returning HSD_Text*, gmCamera_801A253C taking s32* arguments, and gmCamera_801A33BC returning void.
Added struct CameraVsData to gm/types.h with a u32* x0 state pointer and a union exposing either named HSD_Text* slots slot_a, slot_b, bottom_text or an indexed HSD_Text* text[3].

Corrected the MinorSceneHandler gm_803DA920 table in gmscdata.c from MJ_* major-scene constants to MN_* minor-scene constants, including entries such as MN_TITLE, MN_MENU, MN_VS, MN_CAMERA_VS, and MN_COUNT.
smart_moves: The scene table fix recognized that gm_803DA920 indexes minor scene handlers, not major scenes; this made the callback mapping coherent and was praised by review.
Using a union in CameraVsData allowed the same three HSD_Text pointers to be accessed both by semantic names and by an array loop for cleanup.
Moving static file-scope declarations into gmcamera.static.h followed the project pattern for static globals while keeping gmCamera-specific data localized.
Replacing local extern declarations with proper headers improved type consistency for HSD_Text/SISLib calls and reduced fragile hand-written prototypes.
The dont_inline pragma around gmCamera_801A2650 shows a matching tactic: preserve compiler codegen for a small helper that might otherwise be inlined or reordered.
The OnFrame implementation kept repeated button reads and bitmask conditions close to observed behavior rather than over-abstracting them, which is often safer for matching.
decomp_lessons: When a scene-handler table's callbacks appear nonsensical, verify whether the discriminator enum is major scene or minor scene before assuming callback order is wrong.
For UI text data, prefer real HSD_Text typing over void* or ad hoc unknown structs once sislib headers are available; this enables field-level matches such as x24.x, x24.y, and x49.
A small struct with both named fields and an array view is useful when code alternates between semantic slot access and loop-based cleanup.
Do not leave large m2c diagnostic comments in final matched code once the pointer arithmetic or struct layout is resolved.
Static headers can be used to expose file-local BSS/static declarations to the translation unit without polluting broader public headers.
If changing enum families in data tables, reviewers may validate the result by checking whether callbacks now semantically match the table entries.
naming_conventions: Camera-mode functions use the gmCamera_ address-based prefix, with lifecycle suffixes such as _OnFrame, _OnEnter, and _OnLeave.
Minor scene enum constants use the MN_* prefix, while major scene constants use MJ_*; this PR demonstrates that MinorSceneHandler entries should use MN_* values.
Unknown gmCamera structs remain address/domain-prefixed, such as gmCameraUnkStruct and gmCameraUnkStruct2, while newly understood aggregate state was named CameraVsData.
Text slots in CameraVsData were named by UI meaning as slot_a, slot_b, and bottom_text, with a parallel text[3] array for iteration.
Field names still use offset-style placeholders such as x0, x20, x24, x54 where semantics are not yet fully known, with comments added where evidence exists.
assembly_or_matching_tactics: Used #pragma dont_inline on/reset around gmCamera_801A2650 to control compiler inlining for matching.

Resolved a previous pointer-arithmetic matching issue in gmCamera_801A2334 by computing arg0 * 0x10 and casting the address of gmCamera_80479BC8.gcus2_ptrs to gmCameraUnkStruct2* before accessing fields.
Retyped HSD_SisLib_803A5ACC result as HSD_Text* and wrote directly to nested text position fields, replacing unknown struct field accesses.
Kept explicit casts such as (SisLibUnkStruct*)HSD_SisLib_804D1124 and (s32) comparisons where they likely influence generated code or signedness.
Used PAD_STACK(8) in gmCamera_801A3634_OnEnter, indicating stack-shape preservation for matching.

review_feedback.author: r-burns
review_feedback.comment: Good catch! I was wondering why these callbacks didn't make any sense, should have realized they are minor scene ids
review_feedback.lesson: The changed gm_803DA920 table entries from MJ_* to MN_* were correct because the table is keyed by minor scene IDs.

follow_up_queries: Find later PRs that further type gmCameraUnkStruct, gmCameraUnkStruct2, or CameraVsData fields.
Check whether HSD_SisLib_804D1124 later receives a proper SIS/global type instead of the local SisLibUnkStruct cast.
Search for other MinorSceneHandler tables still using MJ_* constants where MN_* constants are expected.
Look for follow-up work on gmCamera_801A253C, gmCamera_801A25C8, gmCamera_801A26C0, and gmCamera_801A33BC.
Verify whether gmCamera_80479C20.x0 state values 0, 1, and 2 were later named or converted to an enum.
